scripts.start: node -e "const http=require('http');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const types={'.html':'text/html; charset=utf-8','.css':'text/css; charset=utf-8','.js':'application/javascript; charset=utf-8'};http.createServer((req,res)=>{let urlPath=req.url==='/'?'index.html':req.url.slice(1);const filePath=path.join(root,urlPath);fs.readFile(filePath,(err,data)=>{if(err){res.writeHead(404,{'Content-Type':'text/plain; charset=utf-8'});res.end('Not found');return;}res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':types[path.extname(filePath)]||'application/octet-stream'});res.end(data);});}).listen(3000,()=>console.log('Server running at http://localhost:3000'));"
